components.text:
I found it near the cauldron. For a long time I thought it was a scholar's accessory — decorative, or carried by someone who wanted to appear unarmed.

It is neither.

Opened and moved with intention, it channels airflow directly beneath the cauldron's base. The flame does not grow larger — it concentrates. The heat climbs faster and holds steadier than any fire I could manage without it.

Some refinements I had written off as failures were not failures. They needed more heat than I was producing. The fan fixed that.
